barRaise.topFinding: BLOCK: hard rule no_public_link_to_hordes_or_brackish_rising is breached by three public gate anchors (index.html:1849,1959; 404.html:133) for the sixth consecutive run; the design.html reroute that clears it has not shipped. No YaE content commit landed since the last run, so all 20 open actions stand and none closed. The one regression is the cross-project work queue growing a third straight run from 270KB to 290KB (5.41x to 5.80x the FUSE truncation threshold) with appends still not atomic, dropping data-integrity 62 to 60; health holds at 67. The quiet positive is two correct fixes staged in the working tree one release away: the sitemap parity auto-regen in update-project-pages.mjs (with a matching regenerated sitemap.xml) and accurate CLAUDE.md handler edits. The 2026-07-07 finding cohort is now six runs open (chronic). Sensitive paths and a credential-location note are kept out of this public JSON.
